description: PHASE 10: Security Hardening, PWA Final Configuration, and Deployment Setup. Covers TASK-023, TASK-024, and TASK-025.
steps: Create backend/app/middleware/__init__.py
Create backend/app/middleware/logging.py with request logging middleware: method, path, status, duration (no body, no token logging), mask CCCD numbers
Create backend/app/middleware/security.py with security headers middleware
Add rate limiting to main.py using slowapi: global 100 req/min/IP, auth endpoints 10 req/min/IP, OCR upload 20 req/hour/user
Review all Pydantic models to add max_length constraints (title<=200, description<=2000), validate UUID path params
Add file upload validation: MIME type whitelist (image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp), size limits (10MB meter/maintenance, 20MB CCCD), random filename generation
Add webhook HMAC-SHA256 signature verification for payment webhook
Update frontend/public/manifest.json with complete PWA manifest (icons, screenshots, orientation, lang=vi)
Update frontend/public/sw.js with complete caching strategies: Cache First for app shell, Network First for API with cache fallback, Stale While Revalidate for images
Create frontend/public/offline.html with offline fallback page (brand colors, logo, retry button)
Add install prompt banner in AppLayout (beforeinstallprompt event handling)
Add update available banner (new service worker detected)
Update frontend/vite.config.ts with complete vite-plugin-pwa configuration
Create frontend/vercel.json with build config, SPA rewrites, security headers, service worker cache control
Create frontend/.env.production.example
Create backend/Procfile for Railway: web: uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT
Create backend/railway.toml with nixpacks builder, deploy config, health check
Create backend/.env.production.example with all production env vars listed
Update backend/app/main.py CORS to include production Vercel domain, conditional scheduler start
Update root README.md with complete setup and deployment guide: Supabase setup, API keys, Railway deploy, Vercel deploy, env vars configuration
acceptance_criteria: Rate limiting is configured on auth endpoints and OCR uploads
File upload rejects non-image MIME types and oversized files
Webhook verifies HMAC signature before processing
PWA manifest is complete with all required fields
Service worker implements proper caching strategies
Offline page renders when network is unavailable
Deployment configs exist for both Railway and Vercel
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/PWA-Quan-Ly-Nha-Tro/backend && python -c "from app.main import app; from app.middleware.logging import LoggingMiddleware; print('OK')"
findings: All verifications pass. Backend imports OK. Frontend builds successfully. Used Python 3.9 available on the system (not 3.11 as documented) but code is compatible. The vite-plugin-pwa generates its own sw.js in dist/ during build (separate from public/sw.js which serves as custom SW for dev). The CORS wildcard pattern https://*.vercel.app is set but FastAPI CORSMiddleware does not support wildcards in subdomains natively - may need explicit domain in production.
